title: net-snmp security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:5.9.4-15.0.1.2]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 35010262]

[1:5.9.4-15.2]
- fix out of bound access (RHEL-137497)

[1:5.9.4-15.1]
- enable PQC (RHEL-112338)
full_text:
[1:5.9.4-15.0.1.2]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 35010262]

[1:5.9.4-15.2]
- fix out of bound access (RHEL-137497)

[1:5.9.4-15.1]
- enable PQC (RHEL-112338)
